D1_source_reachability.details: S1301 is a purely theoretical schematic (Fig 13.7, p. 633). Real HTTP HEAD performed 2026-05-18: primary_source.url https://global.oup.com/academic/product/capitalism-9780199390632 returned 202 Accepted (book product page is live; OUP applies a 202 anti-bot wrapper for HEAD which resolves to 200 on browser GET). The 'source' for a theoretical figure is the book itself — both the OUP product page and the local PDF in Inputs/Capitalism Data/ are reachable, so D1 scores full credit.

D2_year_coverage.details: Figure 13.7 has no calendar axis (unlabelled time index 0-75) and no empirical observations — equation 13.43 is an analytical realisation. Per the template, year_coverage_pct is N/A for theoretical content_type (extension_status = not_applicable_theoretical), so D2 is scored generously at full credit as instructed in the assignment brief and consistent with the Phase 4 plan's treatment of non-time-series series.

D3_license_compatibility.details: The 'source' is Shaikh (2016) Capitalism, Oxford UP. Reproducing a single schematic figure for replication purposes is fair use; no commercial / proprietary data is involved. Equation 13.43 itself is public mathematical knowledge (Nelson and Plosser 1982; Enders 2004). No licensing risk.

D4_units_consistency.details: primary_source.units field is explicit and populated: 'ln Y on vertical axis (model units, 8.0 to 12.5); arbitrary time index on horizontal axis (0 to 75)'. Construction is 'formula' with components (ln Y0, alpha, epsilon_t). All units are dimensionless model units of log output, consistent with the equation 13.43 derivation. No loader-units mismatch possible since there is no observed data to load.

D5_extension_feasibility.details: Theoretical content_type: extensions do not apply per Anu Framework rule ('Extensions ONLY apply to time_series type'). extension_status = not_applicable_theoretical. Scored generously per assignment brief. Phase 5 task is to render the schematic for a chosen illustrative parameter set (ln Y0, alpha, sigma_epsilon, seed) — the parameters are not published by Shaikh and any faithful replica must declare its choice in the EPR.

D6_no_proxy_compliance.details: No proxies possible — the figure is an analytical construction, not a measurement. The Phase 3 dossier explicitly notes that any rendered curve must declare its illustrative parameter values, satisfying the No-Proxies-Without-Disclosure rule by construction.

per_series.name: Actual and Equilibrium Paths of Output

content_type_correction.rationale: Figure 13.7 has no calendar time axis and no observed data; the curve is a realisation of eq. 13.43 (ln Y_t = ln Y0 + alpha*t + eta_t with eta_t = sum epsilon_i), a deterministic linear trend plus a random-walk-with-drift error. The companion Figures 13.8/13.9/13.10 in the same passage are analytical variants of the same construction. No empirical data file exists in SalvagedInputs/book_data/ShaikhChoppedTables/ for this figure — consistent with theoretical content_type. Phase 3 reclassification ratified.

per_series.license: academic-public (Shaikh 2016, OUP; eq. 13.43 itself is public mathematical knowledge per Nelson and Plosser 1982 / Enders 2004)
per_series.units: ln Y on vertical axis (model units, 8.0 to 12.5); arbitrary time index on horizontal axis (0 to 75)
remediation: In series_registry.json, set content_type='theoretical' (was 'cross_sectional' in Phase 2 stub).
Phase 5 replicator must declare illustrative parameter values (ln Y0, alpha, sigma_epsilon, RNG seed) in the EPR — Shaikh does not publish them.
No data extension; figure rendered analytically only.

chapter_level_recommendations: Ratify Phase 3 reclassification of S1301 from 'cross_sectional' to 'theoretical'. Figure 13.7 is an analytical schematic of eq. 13.43 with no calendar time axis and no observed data.
Apply registry update: series_registry.json S1301 content_type -> 'theoretical', construction stays 'formula', extension_candidates stays [].

Chapter 13 entire body (figures 13.1–13.10) plus Appendix 13.1 (figures 13.1.A, 13.1.B) is theoretical; the Phase 2 classifier correctly limited the registry to only S1301 representing Fig 13.7. No additional series to register.
Phase 5 replicator must publish a parameter-disclosure note in the EPR (initial level, drift, shock variance, seed) since Shaikh does not state them.
open_questions: Phase 5 should choose illustrative parameter values (e.g., ln Y0 = 8, alpha = 0.03, sigma_epsilon = 0.015, seed=42) and produce a single rendered version with full parameter disclosure. No data-driven calibration is possible since Fig 13.7 is not fit to any historical series.

Companion figures 13.8 / 13.9 / 13.10 in the same passage are analytically identical constructions (different shock configurations). The registry intentionally captures only Fig 13.7 as the canonical schematic; should Phase 5 also render 13.8-13.10 as bonus replications? Recommend yes — same loader, parameter-only change — but not in scope for Ch13 adequacy.
